summary: remove.bg API provides background removal for images via HTTPS, supporting URL/file inputs, output tuning options, and account credit checks.

auth.instructions: Create an API key in your remove.bg account dashboard and send it in the `X-Api-Key` header on each request. Keep keys secret and do not place them in URLs or client-side public code.

external_docs.description: remove.bg API page and reference hub

endpoints.name: remove-background-from-url
endpoints.description: Removes the background from an image specified by URL. Send multipart/form-data with `image_url` and optional output controls such as `size`, `format`, and background settings.

endpoints.name: remove-background-from-file
endpoints.description: Removes the background from an uploaded image file. Send multipart/form-data with `image_file`; binary image output is returned by default.

endpoints.name: get-account
endpoints.description: Returns account information such as remaining credits; documented on remove.bg API page/changelog as `GET /v1.0/account`.
